description_long: This is a two-tiered chocolate cake with a rich, dark chocolate ganache drip cascading down the sides of both layers. The cake is decorated on top with several chocolate chip cookies and donut-shaped pastries, arranged in a visually appealing cluster. Around the lower tier, there are rectangular pieces of chocolate bar embedded into the frosting, adding texture and visual interest. The cake is displayed on a classic, round, white cake stand with a pedestal base, elevating it for presentation. The surface of the cake appears slightly textured, suggesting a buttercream or whipped frosting beneath the ganache. The overall appearance is indulgent and festive, suitable for celebrations or display in a bakery window.
description: A two-tiered chocolate cake with ganache drip, topped with cookies and donuts, and chocolate bars around the sides, presented on a white cake stand.
description_view_0: Front view shows the ganache drip, three cookies and two donuts on top, and chocolate bars on the lower tier.
description_view_1: This view highlights the donut decorations on top and the ganache drip, with more of the cake's right side visible.
description_view_2: The top decorations are more clustered to the left, and fewer chocolate bars are visible on the lower tier.
description_view_3: This angle shows the most donuts on top and a clear view of the chocolate bars on the lower tier.
